inputs.name: backBtnAriaLabel
inputs.description: aria-label and title value for the back button

inputs.name: detailsAreaTitleHeading
inputs.description:
Heading level for the title in the Details Area
Default value is 2
Acceptable values: number 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6

inputs.name: detailsAreaTitleHeadingSize
inputs.description:
Heading level display size for the title in the Details Area (controls the font size)
Default value is 5
Acceptable values: number 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6
